xsl:when.test: strikethrough_retail_price and strikethrough_retail_price/@gross > 0 and strikethrough_retail_price/@gross > sizes/size/price/@gross and price/@gross = price/@gross

(strikethrough_retail_price and strikethrough_retail_price/@gross > sizes/size/price/@gross) or (promotion/price/normal_retail_price and promotion/price/normal_retail_price/@gross > sizes/size/price/@gross) or (promotion/price/normal_retail_price and price/@gross != sizes/size/price/@gross and promotion/price/normal_retail_price/iaiext:site/iaiext:price_per_size[@id = ../../../../../sizes/size/@id]/@gross > sizes/size/price/@gross)

sizes/size/stock[@id = 1]/@quantity > 0 or sizes/size/stock[@id = 11]/@quantity > 0 or sizes/size/stock[@id = 16]/@quantity > 0 or sizes/size/stock[@id = 0]/@quantity > 0 or sizes/size/stock[@id = 1]/@quantity = -1 or sizes/size/stock[@id = 11]/@quantity = -1 or sizes/size/stock[@id = 16]/@quantity = -1 or sizes/size/stock[@id = 0]/@quantity = -1
